summary: Phase 2 CVE Management Platform testing complete. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Phase 2 tabs verified (Scanners, CI/CD, Policy Engine). Real security scanning tools (Trivy, Grype, Syft, Checkov) are installed and producing actual vulnerability data.
critical_code_review_comments: Scanner service properly orchestrates 4 real security tools (trivy v0.58.2, grype v0.108.0, syft v1.42.0, checkov 3.2.501)
All scanner endpoints exclude MongoDB _id correctly
Policy-as-Code rules engine correctly evaluates severity_threshold, cvss_threshold, package_blocklist, and iac_failures conditions
Pipeline generator produces valid GitHub Actions YAML with proper job dependencies
Scan results include proper severity summaries and detailed findings
Frontend data-testid attributes properly implemented for all Phase 2 interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Policy rules seeded via POST /api/cve/scanners/policy-rules/seed - 5 default rules. Multiple scans already run during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Multi-Scanner Integration fully functional. MongoDB collections for Phase 2: cve_scan_results, cve_policy_rules, cve_pipeline_configs. All 4 security tools are physically installed and produce REAL vulnerability data. Grype found ~30 vulnerabilities, Checkov found 74 checks (42 passed/32 failed), Trivy IaC found 19 misconfigs, Syft found 239 packages. Policy engine correctly blocks deployments based on rules. Pipeline generator creates valid GitHub Actions YAML.

mocked_apis.note: All scanner APIs run REAL security tools producing actual vulnerability data - NO MOCKING

backend_tests.GET /api/cve/scanners/tools: PASS - Returns all 4 tools as installed (trivy, grype, syft, checkov)
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/scanners/trivy/fs: PASS - Trivy filesystem scan returns vulnerabilities with severity summary
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/scanners/trivy/iac: PASS - Trivy IaC scan returns 19+ misconfigurations from /tmp/test_iac
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/scanners/grype: PASS - Grype scan returns ~30 real vulnerabilities (1C, 10H, 14M)
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/scanners/syft: PASS - Syft SBOM returns 239 packages from /app/backend
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/scanners/checkov: PASS - Checkov scan returns 74 checks (42 passed, 32 failed)
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/scanners/results: PASS - Lists scan history with summaries
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/scanners/results/{id}: PASS - Returns full scan result with details
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/scanners/policy-rules/seed: PASS - Seeds default rules or reports existing
backend_tests.DELETE /api/cve/scanners/policy-rules/{i: PASS - Deletes rule, returns 404 on re-fetch
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/scanners/policy-rules/eval: PASS - Evaluates policies, returns deploy_allowed flag with triggered/passed rules
backend_tests.POST /api/cve/scanners/pipeline/generate: PASS - Generates GitHub Actions YAML with configured jobs
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/scanners/pipeline/list: PASS - Lists generated pipelines without yaml_content
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/scanners/pipeline/{id}: PASS - Returns full pipeline with yaml_content

frontend_tests.Scanners tab content: PASS - Shows 4 installed tools with versions, 5 scanner cards, scan history with real results
frontend_tests.CI/CD tab content: PASS - Pipeline config form with repo/branch inputs, scanner checkboxes, generate button
frontend_tests.Pipeline generation: PASS - Generates 2500+ char YAML with trivy, grype jobs, shows copy/download buttons
frontend_tests.Policy Engine tab content: PASS - Shows 5 policy rules with toggle/delete, evaluate section
frontend_tests.Policy evaluation: PASS - Shows 'DEPLOY BLOCKED' result when evaluating Checkov scan against rules
frontend_tests.Scan history expandable: PASS - Shows scanner type, status, severity counts, timestamps
